skills.name: TanStack Query v5 — Server State Management
skills.description: Use TanStack Query v5 for all server state. Covers useQuery, useMutation, cache invalidation, and staleTime/gcTime.

skills.name: Zustand — Client State Store Patterns
skills.description: Use Zustand for client-side state. Slice pattern, immer middleware, devtools, and persist.

skills.name: Jotai — Atomic State Management
skills.description: Use Jotai for fine-grained atomic state. Derived atoms, async atoms, and atomWithStorage.

skills.name: Server State vs Client State Decision Matrix
skills.description: Classify state correctly: server state in TanStack Query, client state in Zustand/Jotai, URL state in search params. Avoid duplicating server data into client stores.

skills.name: Optimistic Updates with TanStack Query
skills.description: Implement optimistic UI updates: apply change immediately, rollback on failure. Prevents jarring loading states for mutations.

skills.name: TanStack Query SSR Prefetching with Next.js
skills.description: Prefetch queries on the server and dehydrate state to avoid client-side waterfalls in Next.js App Router.

skills.name: URL as State with nuqs
skills.description: Persist shareable UI state (filters, sort, tabs, pagination) in URL search params using nuqs for type-safe, Next.js-compatible URL state.

skills.name: React Context Without Re-render Hell
skills.description: Prevent unnecessary re-renders from context by splitting context, memoizing values, or using useContextSelector.
